title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.230 - To whom directed
text:
492.230.  To whom directed. — The commission shall be to such person as the court or judge shall appoint, to be named in the commission, or to some proper officer of the government where the witnesses may be, commanding such person or officer to examine such witnesses, naming them, upon interrogatories.
(RSMo 1939 § 1932) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1768; 1919 § 5455; 1909 § 6399
